name: Engine Command
subtitle: Select a campaign to enter the war room.

overview.thesis: Positioning gummy nutrition as a non-negotiable morning ritual for high-performers.
overview.targetAvatar: Busy urban executives (28-45) who skip breakfast but value long-term vitality.

strategy: The 'Inertia Breaker' – Addressing the difficulty of starting high-friction habits.
Cognitive Ease – Nutrition doesn't have to be a pill or a powder.
The Vitality Loop – Better mornings lead to better evenings.
headlines: Stop swallowing pills. Start eating Greens.
The morning ritual for those who don't have time for rituals.

visual.shotList: Macro close-ups of gummy texture, early morning sunlight on kitchen counters, minimalist packaging.
visual.aesthetic: High-contrast, clean, airy but saturated. Luxury wellness.
